name: Passage by 1Password
description: Passage by 1Password — Passkey authentication and user management API enabling FIDO2/WebAuthn-based passwordless login.

seo.title: Passage by 1Password — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Passage by 1Password: Passage by 1Password — Passkey authentication and user management API enabling FIDO2/WebAuthn-based passwordless login.

when_to_use: FIDO2/WebAuthn passkey login for consumer web applications
Passkey enrollment flow for existing username/password apps
Biometric passkey support for iOS and Android native apps
Drop-in passkey API reducing credential phishing risk

pros: Passkey-first auth backed by 1Password brand and trust
Clean SDKs for web, iOS, Android and server
Covers user management, not just the WebAuthn layer
Fair free tier for small apps
cons: Less flexible than building on raw WebAuthn libs
Smaller ecosystem than Auth0 or Clerk
review.verdict: Strong choice if you want passkeys with minimal backend work and a trusted vendor behind the SDK.
review.best_for: Startups shipping passkey login without rolling WebAuthn themselves
review.not_for: Enterprises needing full IAM, SCIM and deep customization

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
